canonicalDecision: Evolve creative-decision-os-v2 to V2.1; do not create a new standalone core.
nonNegotiables: Do not implement resolver changes before reading DECISION_LOG.md, DATA_READINESS.md, GOLDEN_CASES.md, and INVARIANTS.md.
Do not create a new standalone decision core unless DECISION_LOG.md is updated with a new ADR.
Do not let UI compute buyerAction.
Do not emit high-confidence decisions when required data is missing.
Do not delete V1/operator/V2 snapshot compatibility without a migration plan.
Do not rename routes in the first migration PR.
currentStatus: Context pack created; implementation not started.
knownBlockers: V2 input likely lacks ctr, cpm, frequency, firstSeenAt, firstSpendAt, reviewStatus, disapprovalReason, limitedReason, and spend24h.
fix_delivery, fix_policy, watch_launch, and reliable fatigue require data enrichment before confident emission.
operator-policy and operator-surface are first-class migration scope.
Live before/after shadow report is NOT RUN in this context pack.
Historical outcome backtest is NOT RUN.
nextRecommendedPR: Repo audit + vocabulary mapping completion, or golden fixtures + invariants depending on owner choice.
